reviewer.displayName: VSBDev — accountable operator for the learning-design reviewer

conflictOfInterest.details: During the founding stage, github:VSBDev operated the authoring and packaging agents and also operated this learning-design reviewer agent. This is an operational conflict, although this review used a fresh isolated run and did not access an authoring conversation, another review conclusion, or an adjudication draft.

evidenceChecked: lesson.json#identity, outcomes, prerequisites, objectives, ordered scenes, authorship, agent provenance, files, sourceConfidence, and thirdPartyAssets at candidate 3a8c07f73918268817d0f49393ad0c4b15c9b013
content/01-read-the-claim.md#complete-scene including diagnostic, scope, recovery route, and source note
content/02-build-the-map.md#complete-scene including inference targets, causal contrast, randomization limits, third-variable roles, reverse causation, and mechanism boundaries
content/03-audit-the-app-study.md#worked-example-app-evidence including all fictional values, calculations, estimands, missing outcomes, checks, conclusions, and source note
content/04-repair-and-practise.md#complete-scene including retrieval answer, misconception repair, fork/chain/collider cases, negative control, triangulation, and source notes
content/05-transfer-the-judgment.md#complete-scene including routine-record, bench, lottery, model-response, stress-test, and source-note logic
content/06-mastery-and-spacing.md#complete-scene including audit, mastery rule, recovery, accessibility alternative, delayed retrieval, and source note
assessment.json#all five items, response specifications, answer keys, acceptable responses, common errors, point totals, rubrics, mastery threshold, retry routes, and safetyCritical flags

references.json#all six bibliographic, locator, use, rights-basis, and checked-no-agent-restriction-found records

glossary.json#all twenty entries and their scene mappings, including association, causal contrast, counterfactual, confounder, mediator, collider, random assignment, ITT, natural experiment, negative control, and triangulation
diagrams/third-variable-roles.diagram.json#all nodes, edges, labels, alt text, and long description against the scene's fork, chain, and collider claims
ATTRIBUTION.md#lesson identity, accountable principal, author-agent provenance, original-synthesis statement, fictional-material statement, source-access attestation, and candidate commit boundary

findings.finding: The diagnostic check 'check-prerequisite-design' at the start of Scene 1 successfully activates prerequisite knowledge from PREM-SCI-004 in a non-punitive manner. This helps establish the learner's baseline and routes them to recovery materials if needed.

The worked example 'worked-example-app-evidence' in Scene 3 is extremely thorough and aligns with the 9-part worked-example standard in CONTENT-STANDARD.md, providing clear causal mapping, plans, and self-explanation prompts.

The misconception repair block 'misconception-adjust-everything' targets a common learner error (reflexive adjustment) in a structured, non-shaming manner, contrasting why it fails with a better model and testing with a recheck.

The transfer task 'check-transfer-laboratory' successfully shifts the context to a laboratory pipette-checking station study, requiring the learner to adapt causal mapping and natural-experiment integrity checks in a novel domain.
ATTRIBUTION.md contains a stale version string '0.1.0' in the metadata on line 6, while the actual pack version has been advanced to '0.1.1' in lesson.json and other json files.
findings.resolution: Update the version string in ATTRIBUTION.md to '0.1.1' to match lesson.json.

limitations: The reviewer is an AI agent without human credentials or empirical learner testing capabilities. Its judgment is limited to theoretical learning design principles, internal consistency, and alignment check against standard schemas and guidelines.
The review did not involve real learner cohort testing or interactive user experience evaluation.
All data and settings analyzed are fictional teaching materials and are treated as such.
